files.purpose: Project manifest with Phaser and Vite scripts/dependencies for the Milestone 1 vertical slice.
Vite configuration using relative base path for Azure Static Web Apps compatibility.
Single-page app entry HTML that mounts the Phaser game bundle.
Azure Static Web Apps routing config with SPA navigation fallback to index.html.
Creates the Phaser game instance, registers scenes, enables Arcade Physics, and seeds the GameManager in registry.
Singleton-style game state manager for score, lives, difficulty level, multiplier, timer, and round outcome transitions.
Centralized keyboard input abstraction exposing Axis_Horizontal, Axis_Vertical, isStrikeJustPressed, and isStartJustPressed plus debug keys.
Canonical scene/sport routing constants for pickleball, soccer, and mash-up modes to prevent string drift across files.
Shared feel/instrumentation helper implementing hit-stop, camera shake, particles, UI pulses, fail flow, and ?dev=1 GF-ID logging.
Canonical asset manifest and key constants defining all M1 asset keys and source paths for BootScene preload iteration.
Preloads all declared assets by iterating the canonical asset manifest, applies pixel-art rendering rules, and starts the menu.
Title/menu scene with instructions, start prompt, and defensive debug routing to pickleball, soccer, or mash-up scenes.
Shared gameplay scene that wires the selected controller and level manager, renders global HUD, runs timer logic, and handles win/fail/debug skips.
1.5-second full-screen result overlay scene that shows win/fail feedback, updates progression, and auto-routes to the next random sport.
Pickleball player controller handling lower-half movement, 500ms paddle activation, paddle visual pulse, and collision group hookup.
Pickleball rules/environment manager for court drawing, kitchen hazard, deterministic AI serve cycle, ball physics, volley win condition, and fail checks.
Soccer player controller handling pitch movement, last-move direction tracking, proximity kick, and strike hitbox generation.
Soccer rules/environment manager for pitch and goal setup, goalie oscillation, soccer ball physics, goal detection, and celebration/fail flow.
